_description: Special cards that affect threshold calculations beyond what the JSON thresholds field shows. These cards provide threshold through abilities, not innate site icons.

Annual Fair.note: (1) -> Gain any element this turn. Full source but only for spells castable at +1 mana.

Mirror Realm.note: Copies a nearby site. Cannot be first source. 1 multi-pip element = full, 2 = 0.5, 3-4 = 0.25.

Valley of Delight.note: Genesis: permanently becomes one element. 2-color single-pip = full, multi-pip/3-4 color = 0.5.

Floodplain.note: Has 1 water pip innately. Can flood adjacent site for effectively 2 water. Count as 1.33 water for 2+ pip calcs.

Mismanaged Mortuary.note: Innately flooded (water site). JSON shows 0 threshold but being flooded means it provides water threshold.

Algae Bloom.note: Has 1 water pip innately. Genesis: provides (A)(E)(F) this turn only. Partial source for non-water elements.

Autumn Bloom.note: Has 1 earth pip innately. Genesis: provides (A)(F)(W) this turn only. Partial source for non-earth elements.

Desert Bloom.note: Has 1 fire pip innately. Genesis: provides (A)(E)(W) this turn only. Partial source for non-fire elements.

Twilight Bloom.note: Has 1 air pip innately. Genesis: provides (E)(F)(W) this turn only. Partial source for non-air elements.

City of Glass.note: (A) threshold with 2 mana, but destroyed when damaged. Count as full air source.

City of Plenty.note: (W) threshold with 2 mana, but also gives opponent 1 mana. Count as full water source.

City of Souls.note: (E) threshold with 2 mana, but enemies can redirect damage. Count as full earth source.

City of Traitors.note: (F) threshold with 2 mana, but opponent can cast stealthed minions here. Count as full fire source.

The Empyrean.note: Provides (A)(E)(F)(W) IF you control a nearby Angel or Ward. Conditional — count as 0.5 source each.

Crossroads.note: Genesis: look at next 4 sites, keep 1, bottom 3. Improves atlas quality. Counts as ~0.5 extra look.

Imperial Road.note: Genesis: opponent then you may play a site adjacent. Extra site = extra mana + threshold.

Pristine Paradise.note: Provides all 4 elements but ONLY if completely empty (no units). Already in JSON thresholds.

The Colour Out of Space.note: Provides all 4 elements but ONLY if adjacent to the void. Already in JSON thresholds.

Pond.note: Genesis: next Beast cast here costs (1) less, ignoring threshold.

Tournament Grounds.note: Knights/Sirs/Dames cast here require no threshold.

Dragonlord's Lair.note: Dragons cast here require no threshold and cost (1) less.

Den of Evil.note: Genesis: next Evil cast here costs (1) less, ignoring threshold.

Elementalist.note: Always has +1 of each element. Reduces all threshold requirements by 1 pip.

Pathfinder.note: Forces Pathfinder archetype. No opening hand sites, plays top site each turn. No duplicates.

Seer.note: Scry top site/spell each turn. Counts as +0.5 atlas looks per turn.

Avatar of Water.note: Can flood a site adjacent to body of water each turn. Flooded sites become water threshold sources.

Waveshaper.note: Can flood a site near body of water each turn. Flooded sites become water threshold sources.

Geomancer.note: Second tap ability plays topmost site from atlas to replace Rubble. Extra site = extra threshold source.

Blacksmith Family.note: Minion: provides (F). Fractional same as Cores.

Castle Servants.note: Minion: provides (A). Fractional same as Cores.

Common Cottagers.note: Minion: provides (E). Fractional same as Cores.

Fisherman's Family.note: Minion: provides (W). Fractional same as Cores.

Shrine of the Dragonlord.note: Artifact: provides (A)(E)(F)(W) and 1 extra mana. Fractional same as Cores, but for ALL elements.

Land Surveyor.note: Genesis: draw a site. Extra atlas look: 1=negligible, 2=0.20, 3=0.33, 4-7=0.50.

Kettletop Leprechaun.note: Deathrite: draw a site. Less reliable than genesis. 1=negligible, 2-3=0.15, 4=0.25.

Frontier Settlers.note: Tap: play topmost site to adjacent void. One-time use. Counts as ~0.25 extra look.

Landmass.note: Magic: draw a site, may play a land site. Counts as ~0.15 extra look per copy.

Overflow.note: Magic: draw a site, may play a water site. Counts as ~0.15 extra look per copy.

Sow the Earth.note: Aura: plays top site to a void. That site provides DOUBLE mana and threshold. Counts as ~0.25 extra look.

Clay Golem.note: Artifact: deathrite plays top site. Less reliable. Counts as ~0.10 extra look per copy.

Tide Naiads.note: Minion: its site is flooded (becomes water site). Adds water threshold where placed.

Great Old One.note: Minion: genesis permanently floods the entire realm. All sites become water sources.

Mix Aer.note: Artifact: sacrifice -> next Air spell requires no threshold and costs (2) less.

Mix Aqua.note: Artifact: sacrifice -> next Water spell requires no threshold and costs (2) less.

Mix Ignis.note: Artifact: sacrifice -> next Fire spell requires no threshold and costs (2) less.

Mix Terra.note: Artifact: sacrifice -> next Earth spell requires no threshold and costs (2) less.

Four Waters of Paradise.note: Artifact: sacrifice -> next elemental spell requires no threshold and costs (4) less.

Captain Baldassare.note: Minion: cast opponent's discarded spells ignoring threshold.

Sea Raider.note: Minion: cast killed enemy's top spell ignoring threshold.

De Vermis Mysteriis.note: Artifact: bearer may cast minions for (5), ignoring threshold.

Wiccan Tools.note: Artifact: sacrifice -> draw a spell, bearer's spells require no threshold this turn.

Drought.note: Aura: affected sites provide no water threshold. Counters water decks.

Sinterfee.note: Minion: genesis silences adjacent site, it provides no threshold while Sinterfee is in realm.

Atlantean Fate.note: Aura: affected non-Ordinary sites are flooded (water sites, only water threshold, lose other abilities).

Flood.note: Aura: affected sites are flooded (become water sites).
